steps: Open deployed index and inspect source/runtime
actual: Published main contained unresolved merge markers across 26 files
rootCause: A conflicted merge commit was pushed and Pages published it without a source-integrity gate
fix: Recovered the clean v2.2.0-alpha3 tree and removed every merge marker
test: git diff --check; conflict-marker scan; CI; Pages; Edge runtime
onlineVerification: Root 200; zero conflict markers; three clean Edge loads; Pages run 29673436241

steps: Open composer while agent plan has hidden attribute
actual: CSS display:grid overrode native hidden behavior
rootCause: Component display rule had higher practical effect than the hidden attribute
onlineVerification: Edge computed display is none; production console clean

steps: Submit different records consecutively and reload
expected: Each acknowledged record is durable exactly once
actual: Success could be rendered before the IndexedDB replacement completed
rootCause: Persistence path did not expose a single awaited durable transaction
fix: Added persistRecordsDurably and rollback on failure
test: Playwright durable capture; IndexedDB count; reload; CI
onlineVerification: Production saved two consecutive records; memory=2; IndexedDB=2; reload=2

steps: Double-click send then immediately enter a different draft
expected: Same submission is deduplicated while a new draft remains actionable
actual: Debounce and success-state cleanup could suppress or clear a different new draft
rootCause: Deduplication keyed timing but not the submitted text and success state was stale
fix: Keyed duplicate protection by text and reset done state when a new draft is entered
test: Playwright double-click; CDP experience 30/30; production capture
onlineVerification: Production double-click produced one record and the next distinct record saved immediately

steps: Run legacy regression after PWA checks expand to 9
expected: Passing child test remains passing in aggregate
actual: PWA child passed 9/9 but aggregate expected literal 8/8 and failed
rootCause: Aggregate contract was not updated with the child-test count
Metadata was absent from the static document head

actual: Open Graph title description URL and type were absent
rootCause: Metadata was absent from the static document head
fix: Added truthful Open Graph fields and Twitter summary card
onlineVerification: Production root contains og:title og:description og:url

rootCause: Only a generic favicon was declared
fix: Added a local data-URL apple touch icon

steps: Open and close release dialog then interact with page
expected: Dialog only intercepts input while visible
actual: TRAE reported pointer-event blocking; current source gates pointer events by show state
rootCause: Finding belongs to an earlier or isolated build
test: Three production Edge loads; runtime interaction; CSS inspection
onlineVerification: Release overlay is not an input blocker in current production

expected: Static Pages output contains no development client
actual: TRAE reported a production Vite client reference
rootCause: Finding did not match the recovered current tree

steps: Exercise startup and themes while collecting page errors
actual: No current symbol or runtime exception found
test: CDP 7/7; Playwright 5/5; three production Edge loads
onlineVerification: Zero production page errors on three clean loads

steps: Load from varied networks including restricted regions
expected: Readable local fallback when Google Fonts is unavailable
actual: Google Fonts remains an external optional request; universal mainland availability is not proven
rootCause: Legacy typography still requests Google Fonts asynchronously
fix: Accepted for this alpha because system-font fallback preserves function and layout; future release should self-host or remove
test: Direct font request 200; 14-view responsive matrix; offline app
onlineVerification: No functional or layout failure; residual network availability risk recorded

steps: Open app and exercise capture search calendar migration and offline
expected: No unhandled error or rejected promise
actual: Broken conflict deployment previously produced runtime risk
rootCause: Committed conflict markers corrupted production JavaScript
fix: Recovered clean source and added real browser gates
onlineVerification: Three clean production loads; core flow produces zero page errors

steps: Install Service Worker then disconnect and reload
expected: Current cache installs and application restarts offline
actual: TRAE requested verification of offline and icon state
rootCause: Current implementation needed production proof rather than speculative edits
fix: Added apple-touch metadata and verified current cache
test: PWA 9/9; Playwright SW; CDP offline 3/3; production offline
onlineVerification: Cache shike-v220alpha31-v64 installed; index and clipboard cached; offline reload passed

steps: Switch a validated context offline and observe intentionally aborted requests
expected: Cached product remains usable; external font may fail harmlessly
actual: One mixed online/offline audit recorded a transient 503 and aborted font request
rootCause: The same error collector spanned an intentional network-disconnect transition
fix: Separated pure-online and offline tests and repeated online three times
test: Three pure-online loads; direct asset 200; cache match; offline reload
onlineVerification: Pure-online errors=0 and bad responses=0 on 3/3 runs

steps: Inspect navigation routes Service Worker and public claims
expected: Only supported product surfaces are public
actual: TRAE asked for RSS and Watch Center truth
rootCause: Legacy or experimental surfaces could be mistaken for current scope
fix: Watch Center removed by contract; RSS is not an active product promise
onlineVerification: Four primary nav items; no Watch route or precache entry; no public RSS claim

steps: Run all required CDP groups in the former shared-browser aggregate
expected: Every browser group is isolated and deterministic
actual: A documentation-only commit intermittently failed Browser E2E after the same product tree had passed
rootCause: Five stateful CDP groups shared one browser profile and debug session; offline storage and multi-tab state could leak between groups
fix: Changed CI to the seven-group runner with an independent browser profile and CDP port per group; added Linux browser path and no-sandbox support
test: Local CDP 7/7; CI gate 5/5; integrity 690/690; GitHub CI
onlineVerification: GitHub CI run 29674186028 succeeded; Pages run 29674185636 succeeded
